speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Naught, naught, all naught! I can behold no longer.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Th’ Antoniad, the Egyptian admiral,

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: With all their sixty, fly and turn the rudder.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: To see ’t mine eyes are blasted.

speaker: SCARUS
text: Gods and goddesses,

speaker: SCARUS
text: All the whole synod of them!

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: What’s thy passion?

speaker: SCARUS
text: The greater cantle of the world is lost

speaker: SCARUS
text: With very ignorance. We have kissed away

speaker: SCARUS
text: Kingdoms and provinces.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: How appears the fight?

speaker: SCARUS
text: On our side, like the tokened pestilence,

speaker: SCARUS
text: Where death is sure. Yon ribaudred nag of Egypt,

speaker: SCARUS
text: Whom leprosy o’ertake, i’ th’ midst o’ th’ fight,

speaker: SCARUS
text: When vantage like a pair of twins appeared

speaker: SCARUS
text: Both as the same—or, rather, ours the elder—

speaker: SCARUS
text: The breeze upon her like a cow in June,

speaker: SCARUS
text: Hoists sails and flies.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: That I beheld.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Mine eyes did sicken at the sight and could not

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Endure a further view.

speaker: SCARUS
text: She once being loofed,

speaker: SCARUS
text: The noble ruin of her magic, Antony,

speaker: SCARUS
text: Claps on his sea-wing and, like a doting mallard,

speaker: SCARUS
text: Leaving the fight in height, flies after her.

speaker: SCARUS
text: I never saw an action of such shame.

speaker: SCARUS
text: Experience, manhood, honor ne’er before

speaker: SCARUS
text: Did violate so itself.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Alack, alack.

speaker: CANIDIUS
text: Our fortune on the sea is out of breath

speaker: CANIDIUS
text: And sinks most lamentably. Had our general

speaker: CANIDIUS
text: Been what he knew himself, it had gone well.

speaker: CANIDIUS
text: O, he has given example for our flight

speaker: CANIDIUS
text: Most grossly by his own.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Ay, are you thereabouts? Why then goodnight indeed.

speaker: CANIDIUS
text: Toward Peloponnesus are they fled.

speaker: SCARUS
text: ’Tis easy to ’t, and there I will attend

speaker: SCARUS
text: What further comes.

speaker: CANIDIUS
text: To Caesar will I render

speaker: CANIDIUS
text: My legions and my horse. Six kings already

speaker: CANIDIUS
text: Show me the way of yielding.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: I’ll yet follow

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: The wounded chance of Antony, though my reason

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Sits in the wind against me.
